overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a truck driving simulator, showing the interior of a Mercedes truck cabin navigating a snow-covered highway during winter conditions. The vehicle drives through tree-lined sections, elevated bridge ramps with concrete barriers, and finally enters a tunnel.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered multi-lane highway with tree lines

events.description: passing green highway direction sign with Cyrillic text indicating routes

agents.ego_description: driving steadily on snow-covered highway in the right lane, maintaining consistent speed

snow-laden evergreen trees lining the right side of the highway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from inside a Mercedes truck cabin driving on a snow-covered highway. The dashboard and mirrors frame the view of the snowy road ahead, flanked by snow-laden trees on both sides. The vehicle passes a green highway sign with Cyrillic text while maintaining a steady speed along the multi-lane road.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway ramp with concrete sound barriers

events.description: highway curves right and elevates onto bridge structure with concrete barriers
vehicle navigates right-hand curve on elevated ramp, guardrails visible on left only

agents.ego_description: steering through a right-hand curve on the elevated highway ramp, maintaining traction on snow

entered.detail: tall concrete noise reduction wall running along the right side of the elevated highway
elevated road bed with support structures and snow-covered embankments visible below

segments.scene_description: The truck navigates a right-hand curve as the highway elevates onto a bridge structure. Concrete sound barriers appear on the right side, replacing the tree lines, while the left side retains metal guardrails. The road remains snow-covered as the vehicle maintains speed through the elevated ramp section.

scene_state.functional_zone: open highway with metal guardrails and distant industrial structures

events.description: overtaking slower vehicles on the left lane
passing under concrete pedestrian overpass bridge spanning the highway

agents.ego_description: driving straight on open highway, overtaking other vehicles while approaching tunnel

notable_agents.action: white passenger car being overtaken on the left side of the truck
truck traveling ahead in the same lane, visible in the distance

entered.detail: snow-covered trees returning to line the right side of the highway
concrete pedestrian bridge with stairs crossing over the highway
dark tunnel entrance becoming visible in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: The truck drives along a straight section of open highway, overtaking a white car on the left. Snow-covered trees return to line the right side while metal guardrails appear on both sides. The vehicle passes under a pedestrian overpass bridge as a tunnel entrance becomes visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway tunnel interior with artificial lighting and concrete walls

events.description: entering tunnel, transitioning from natural daylight to artificial tunnel lighting
fully inside tunnel with concrete walls replacing open sky and snow-covered landscape

agents.ego_description: driving into the tunnel entrance, adjusting to the enclosed space and artificial lighting conditions

notable_agents.action: truck ahead with illuminated red brake lights visible in the tunnel interior

entered.detail: smooth grey concrete tunnel walls with reflective safety markers
smooth grey concrete tunnel walls with reflective safety markers
overhead fluorescent lighting fixtures illuminating the tunnel interior

segments.scene_description: The truck approaches and enters the tunnel, transitioning from the snowy exterior to the enclosed interior. The natural daylight fades as artificial overhead lighting illuminates the concrete walls. The road surface changes from snow-covered to clear asphalt as the vehicle follows a truck ahead into the tunnel depths.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from within a Mercedes truck cabin as it travels from a forested snowy highway onto an elevated bridge. It begins with the dashboard and mirrors framing a view of a multi-lane road flanked by snow-laden trees, passing a green highway sign with Cyrillic text. As the vehicle maintains its steady speed, the scenery shifts while navigating a right-hand curve. The tree lines then give way to concrete sound barriers on the right and metal guardrails on the left as the highway elevates. The scene finally settles into a steady drive across the snow-covered bridge structure.

The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a truck cabin as it moves from a snowy open highway into the enclosed environment of a tunnel. It begins by overtaking a white car on a straight stretch of road, where snow-covered trees and metal guardrails line the path. As the vehicle passes under a pedestrian overpass, the distant mouth of a tunnel emerges on the horizon. The scene then shifts as the truck crosses the threshold, transitioning from natural daylight and winter weather to the artificial overhead lighting of the tunnel interior. Finally, the road surface transforms from snow-covered to clear asphalt as the camera follows another truck deeper into the concrete passage.
